stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true regarding the human’s ability to deal with circadian dysrhythmia, better known as jet lag?

options.a: There is a prescriptive formula for calculating a precise number of days needed for circadian adaptation.
options.b: The rate of adaptation depends on the number of time zones crossed and the direction of travel.
options.c: The human’s rate of adaptation is independent of the direction and duration of travel.
options.d: Circadian adaptation is less likely to occur during long-haul trips of more than 3 days.
